caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, large over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with the text "BOSS TALK" and a "CEO" logo sits at a desk in a studio. He is wearing a gold chain and a gold watch on his left wrist. In front of him is a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black mug featuring a red and white logo. The background consists of white panels featuring gold stars and the word "HUSTLE," along with red and blue signage that reads "BOSS TALK 101" and "Where BOSSES Talk!". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his focus from looking ahead toward the microphone to looking down at a white piece of paper he holds in his hands. He remains seated in the same position throughout the scene, with his expression remaining relatively consistent while he reviews the document.
